reviews.comment:
En general se recibe muy buena atención tanto en la playa, en el minisuper y en el lavadero, conseguir turno es casi imposible por la demanda ya que lavan excelente. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Overall, the service is excellent, both on the beach, at the mini-market, and at the laundromat. Getting an appointment is nearly impossible due to high demand, as they do an excellent job. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxN09TWC13RRAB
